entities.name: PROSO MILLET
entities.description: An ancient grain recognized for water-use efficiency and short growing season, used in dryland cropping systems.

entities.name: WATER-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to utilize water effectively, a key characteristic of proso millet.

entities.name: SHORT GROWING SEASON
entities.description: The characteristic of proso millet that allows it to mature quickly.

entities.name: WINTER WHEAT-BASED DRYLAND CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: An agricultural system in the High Plains of the USA where proso millet is an indispensable part.

entities.name: HIGH PLAINS OF THE USA
entities.description: The geographical region where the winter wheat-based dryland cropping system is implemented.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL AND HEALTH-PROMOTING PROPERTIES
entities.description: High-value characteristics of proso millet grains that make it popular in the global market.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A widely used method to dissect the genetics of complex traits and identify marker-trait associations.

entities.name: MORPHO-AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Major physical and agricultural characteristics evaluated in proso millet genotypes.

entities.name: WESTERN NEBRASKA
entities.description: The specific locations in the USA where proso millet genotypes were evaluated.

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Genetic variations used to identify associations with morpho-agronomic traits.

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine significant differences among genotypes for specific traits.

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing method used to identify high-quality bi-allelic SNPs.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to identify stratification within a core collection of genotypes.

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The identified links between genetic markers and specific agronomic traits.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Putative genes associated with the evaluated morpho-agronomic traits.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique using genetic markers to select for desired traits.

entities.name: PROSO MILLET BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing high-yielding varieties of proso millet.
